sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45217" key="eu)su/mptwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐσύμ-πτωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45217.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">collapsing easily</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:27:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
